narrative:
Jan Paul van Hecke is a Centre-Back representing the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.58/10 positions him in the top 1% of centre-backs at this tournament. This high rating is significantly influenced by his club form, which accounts for 74% of the score.

At this World Cup, van Hecke averages 2.077 tackles and 4.385 clearances per 90 minutes, showcasing his defensive work rate. He has scored 0.231 goals per 90 minutes, notably outperforming his 0.056 expected goals per 90 minutes. His attacking involvement is further evidenced by 0.692 shots per 90 minutes and 0.074 expected assists per 90 minutes.

Van Hecke is a crucial defensive asset for the Kingdom of the Netherlands, having played 390 minutes in the tournament. Scouts and fans should observe his continued ability to contribute defensively with high tackle and clearance numbers. It will also be interesting to see if he can maintain his surprisingly high goal-scoring rate despite a lower expected goals output.
